top_10.verdict: This code is a decent but not groundbreaking fusion of two algorithms, with some interesting mathematical ideas but also some implementation issues.
top_10.bright_spot: The use of the Lanczos approximation for the Gamma function is a nice touch
top_10.name: hybrid_caputo_fractional_minimum_cost_tree_m35_s7.py

top_10.verdict: This code is a decent but unremarkable combination of two existing algorithms.
top_10.bright_spot: The use of the Hoeffding bound to determine the significance of the Gini gain gap is a nice touch.
top_10.name: hybrid_hoeffding_tree_gini_coefficient_m13_s6.py
